hooks.command:
TASK_ID=$(jq -r '.prompt // ""' | grep -oE '[BUFbuf][0-9]{3,6}' | head -1 | tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]'); [ -n "$TASK_ID" ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Task ID %s detected. Before responding, invoke /prepare-context %s to load task memory and context."}}
' "$TASK_ID" "$TASK_ID" || true
